tasks.instruction: Today I ate out and spent 80 yuan, using 随手记 (SuiShouJi) to record the transaction
rubrics: Extracted correct amount and merchant information
human_references: Open the SuiShouJi app. Its icon is orange with a stylized white yuan (¥) symbol.
Tap the '+' or 'Record' button on the home screen.
Enter 'Eating out' as the category, and input 80 yuan as the amount.
Tap 'Save' or confirm to finish recording the transaction.
